description: Composition Grey crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves, fabric tape lining on the inside of the neck, and screen and rubber print on the chest with a brand tab above the hemline on the left Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments If Sports is your passion, then cycling should not be faraway. Kansas City, where biking is a popular sport and where lee was first given a platform to set shop and grow into a worldwide favourite brand, is a favourite with many sports enthusiasts. Pair this fab t-shirt with slim Fit denims and canvas shoes to don that sporty look that lee loves to dress you in. *This product is developed using the unique multiple hand processes method. Slight peeling of the print post home laundry is absolutely normal, giving it a vintage look, and hence, should not be considered as a defect. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
